title: Deployer Configuration
description: Configuration for integration with external CMDB systems. File may contain multiple named deployer definitions.

credRef.title: Credential Reference
credRef.description: Reference to an external Credential, resolved at runtime through the Secret Store

credId.description: Identifier of the referenced Credential entry

property.description: Optional property name to read from a multi-field Credential

.+.title: Deployer Definition
.+.description: Single deployer definition identified by a unique name

username.title: Username
username.description: Username for authentication with external CMDB. Accepts a plain string or a `$type: credRef` form for an external Credential

token.title: Access Token
token.description: Token for authentication with external CMDB. Accepts a plain string or a `$type: credRef` form for an external Credential
